title: Rich Irish Chocolate Toast
description: A decadent and dense Irish dish featuring dark chocolate on toasted bread, perfect for a solo dinner. This recipe is gluten-free friendly.

ingredients.name: gluten-free bread
ingredients.notes: preferably a dense bread like soda bread

instructions: Slice the gluten-free bread into 1-inch thick slices and place on a baking sheet.
Dot the top of each bread slice with unsalted butter.
Bake the bread in the preheated oven for 5-7 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
In a small saucepan, heat the heavy cream over medium heat until it starts to simmer.
Remove the cream from the heat and add in the dark chocolate chips. Let it sit for 1-2 minutes, then stir until smooth.
Add the granulated sugar, sea salt, and vanilla extract to the chocolate mixture and stir until combined.
Once the bread is ready, let it cool for a minute before spreading the chocolate mixture on top of each slice.
If desired, top with fresh whipped cream and serve immediately.
